title: What Can You Make with AI?
description: The possibilities of creation with AI

scenes.speech: What do you want to make with AI? The possibilities are endless!
scenes.title: What Can You Make with AI?

scenes.speech: Create beautiful art with just words!
scenes.title: Draw with AI
scenes.content: Using Stable Diffusion, Midjourney, or DALL-E, type 'Mount Fuji at sunset with cherry blossoms' and get the image!

scenes.title: Make Music with AI
scenes.content: Suno AI, Udio, MusicLM generate melodies and lyrics. 'Make a relaxing jazz track' and it's done!

scenes.speech: Video production is possible with AI!
scenes.title: Create Videos with AI
scenes.content: Runway, Pika, Sora generate short videos. 'A dog running on the beach' becomes a video from text!

scenes.title: Make Games with AI
scenes.content: ChatGPT and GitHub Copilot write game code for you. Just describe your idea to AI and get a working game!

scenes.speech: AI can be your ultimate co-author!
scenes.title: Write a Book with AI
scenes.content: Build the story skeleton, create characters, write the prose. Human ideas × AI writing power = a complete book!

scenes.speech: AI can help you start a business!
scenes.title: Build a Business with AI
scenes.content: Brainstorming ideas, writing marketing copy, designing logos... with AI you can launch a business on your own!

scenes.speech: No-code + AI means anyone can make apps!
scenes.title: Build an App with AI
scenes.content: No-code tools like Bubble, Adalo, Glide + AI let you build apps without programming knowledge!

scenes.speech: What will you create with your ideas?
scenes.title: Your AI Project
scenes.content: Kids around the world are creating amazing things with AI. Your idea might just change the world!

scenes.speech: With ideas and AI, you can make anything! Let's go for it!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
